name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-20
title: Add leading newline to [🐇 rabbit 🐇] block so message starts on its own line
description:
sync-check.py and session-init.py build systemMessage via '
'.join(...) with no leading newline. Claude Code renders it inline with the 'Stop says:' / 'SessionStart says:' prefix. A leading '
' would push the entire [🐇 rabbit 🐇] block onto its own line. Fix: change '
'.join(payloads) to '
' + '
'.join(payloads) in both aggregation points (sync-check.py main() and session-init.py main()).
